settings.question: How long does shipping take?
settings.answer: Domestic orders typically arrive within 3-5 business days. International orders can take 7-14 business days depending on destination and customs processing.

settings.question: Do you ship internationally?
settings.answer: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times are calculated at checkout based on your location.

settings.question: How should I store my attar?
settings.answer: Keep your attar in a cool, dark place away from direct sunlight. Properly stored, pure oils can last for years without losing their character.

settings.question: Can I return an opened bottle?
settings.answer: Due to the personal nature of fragrance, opened bottles cannot be returned. Unopened items may be returned within 14 days of delivery.

settings.question: Do you offer samples?
settings.answer: Yes — every order includes two complimentary 1ml samples of your choice, so you can explore the collection before committing to a full bottle.

settings.subheading: Everything you need to know before your order arrives
settings.shipping_overview:
All orders are carefully packaged to protect glass bottles in transit and ship within 1-2 business days of purchase. Tracking information is emailed as soon as your order leaves our studio.

  • Domestic: 3-5 business days
  • International: 7-14 business days
  • Free shipping on orders over $150
